wiki.extract: Fossil Group, Inc., is an American fashion design and manufacturer founded in 1984 by Tom Kartsotis and based in Richardson, Texas. Their brands include Fossil, Relic, Michele Watch, Skagen Denmark, WSI, and Zodiac Watches. Fossil also makes licensed accessories for brands such as BMW, Puma, Emporio Armani, Michael Kors, DKNY, Diesel, Kate Spade New York, Tory Burch, Chaps, and Armani Exchange.

sampleRecalls.title: Fossil Group Recalls Bracelet Sold with Skechers Jewelry Gift Sets Due to High Levels of Lead and Cadmium
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves the braided black bracelet that is a part of the Skechers watch/bracelet gift set. The bracelet is black and features a braided pattern with a metal clasp on each end. sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by falling object or equipment, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee had been waiting for tubing to be lowered. The swage came loose and dropped along with the tubing (approximately 31-feet long). It fell 60 feet to the ground, then tipped over and struck the employee's head. The employee was knocked out and sustained a concussion, a broken nose, and lacerations to the head.
